subcodes.title: Extract from a letter to Hooper Harris in Dec. 1906
subcodes.first_line: …Send her [Alma Knobloch] my love and greetings and say:  Blessed are you, in whom whites and blacks are alike. Wisdom is gained through the light of the heart and not through the skin. Blackness is the darkness of the heart and not the darkness of the face
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
